offer: For insurance accounting clerks processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We streamline reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in accurately reconciling premium payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance accounting clerks
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance clerks with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and export on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
